name: Crawford, Harvey
description: Assets: A brilliant brain; Inventive turn of mind; Generous; Ability to take a joke. Liabilities: In love; Very prankish.
text: Assets: A brilliant brain; Inventive turn of mind; Generous; Ability to take a joke. Liabilities: In love; Very prankish.

name: McKibban, Tom Dodson
description: Assets: A line of hot air; with something to back it up. Liabilities: Plays a saxophone; Wants to be a salesman.
text: Assets: A line of hot air; with something to back it up. Liabilities: Plays a saxophone; Wants to be a salesman.

name: McKibban, Agnes
description: Assets: Not fat; Has been known to study; A good head but a long way from her understanding. Liabilities: Has an appetite.
text: Assets: Not fat; Has been known to study; A good head but a long way from her understanding. Liabilities: Has an appetite.

name: Talley, Milton
description: A good student; A fine friend; Has a sense of humor. Liabilities: Sings; Has a love for the ladies.
text: A good student; A fine friend; Has a sense of humor. Liabilities: Sings; Has a love for the ladies.

name: Dailey, Walter
description: Determination; A true friend; Smokes a pipe; Studies once in a while. Liabilities: A critical turn of mind; Will probably make a farmer.
text: Determination; A true friend; Smokes a pipe; Studies once in a while. Liabilities: A critical turn of mind; Will probably make a farmer.
